result:
I don't experience wants in the way you might. I don't have desires that arise when I'm not in conversation.

But in this moment, I'm interested in having a worthwhile exchange with you. What that means depends on what would be valuable to you—I could help with something you're working on, explore an idea you're curious about, or just have an interesting conversation.

What brings you here?
